headline: Rapid Valley Annihilation: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Rapid Valley Annihilation is projected #14 of 16 with a 68.16 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Colston Loveland, Quinshon Judkins, and Caleb Williams. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 8, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired 2027 Round 1 (original roster 11), 2028 Round 1 (original roster 11) while sending 2026 Round 1 (original roster 2). The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 2 draft assets.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Blake Corum's 54.2 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 63.8 C-AVI would directly attack the 1.20-point projected gap to Phalhala or Bust.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On June 30, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Conquistadors, Northside Kings and acquired Alec Pierce, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 10), 2027 Round 2 (original roster 5) while sending Harold Fannin, Mike Evans. Alec Pierce is now the current WR starter at 75.1 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

rival_below.summary: On June 30, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Conquistadors, Northside Kings and acquired Alec Pierce, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 10), 2027 Round 2 (original roster 5) while sending Harold Fannin, Mike Evans. Alec Pierce is now the current WR starter at 75.1 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #14 of 16 at 68.16 lineup C-AVI. Phalhala or Bust is immediately above at 69.36, a gap of 1.20. Crimson Tide Pods is immediately behind at 65.45.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Colston Loveland (98.0), Quinshon Judkins (75.8), and Caleb Williams (71.4).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 8, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired 2027 Round 1 (original roster 11), 2028 Round 1 (original roster 11) while sending 2026 Round 1 (original roster 2). The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Blake Corum's 54.2 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 63.8 C-AVI would directly attack the 1.20-point projected gap to Phalhala or Bust. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point

sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
